spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace @Component with @Service to better express the semantic role of the class within the Spring context.
Mark the static students list as final to enforce immutability of the reference.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: private static final List<Student> students = new ArrayList<>();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Move SecureRandom initialization from a field declaration to a final field to ensure it is initialized once and is immutable.
spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.human_impl: private final SecureRandom random = new SecureRandom();

spring-boot-rest-services-with-unit-and-.general_idea: Replace deprecated Arrays.asList usage with Java 9+ List.of for creating immutable lists in static initialization.
Rename course variables from numeric suffixes (course1) to descriptive names (courseOne) for better readability.
Condense null check and return statement in retrieveCourses into a single ternary expression.
Remove unused import for java.util.Arrays as it is no longer used after switching to List.of.
Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to support Spring Boot 3 and Java 17.
Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to support Spring Boot 3.
Replace JUnit 4 Spring runner with JUnit 5 Spring extension for test context management.
Replace deprecated secure flag in WebMvcTest with explicit WithMockUser annotation for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
Replace Arrays.asList with List.of for immutable list creation in test data setup.
Correct description string in mock data and expected JSON to match '10Steps' format.
Apply consistent indentation and line wrapping to test methods and assertions.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Remove explicit exclusions for SecurityAutoConfiguration and ManagementWebSecurityAutoConfiguration as they are no longer needed or relevant in Spring Boot 3.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.human_impl: Removed @EnableAutoConfiguration annotation with exclude list for SecurityAutoConfiguration and ManagementWebSecurityAutoConfiguration.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Activate the security configuration class by uncommenting the @Configuration annotation.
Prefix in-memory passwords with {noop} to satisfy Spring Security 5.8+ / Spring Boot 3 requirement for explicit password encoding.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update import for LocalServerPort to match Spring Boot 3 package structure.
Correct expected JSON string in test to match actual data format.
Correct course description string in test setup to match expected format.
Add @WithMockUser to handle Spring Security context required by Spring Boot 3 migration.
Remove deprecated 'secure' attribute from @WebMvcTest annotation to comply with Spring Boot 3 API changes.
Update test data string to remove space in description field.
Update expected JSON string in test to match the modified description field.

spring-boot-web-application/src/main/jav.general_idea: Explicitly set a NoOpPasswordEncoder to satisfy Spring Security 5.7+ requirements that mandate password encoding configuration.
